records.question: Who named Rob Cunningham weighs at least 215 and caused at least 3 injuries where the location is Kaio?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people.people_id = perpetrator.people_id
WHERE people.name = 'Rob Cunningham' AND people.weight >= 215.0 AND perpetrator.injured >= 3 AND perpetrator.location = 'Kaio'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN perpetrator AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Rob Cunningham' AND T1.Weight >= 215.0 AND T2.Injured >= 3 AND T2.Location = 'Kaio'

records.question: Which people who weigh at most 190.0 are identified as perpetrators?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people.people_id = perpetrator.people_id
WHERE people.weight <= 190.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 WHERE T1.Weight <= 190.0 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM perpetrator AS T2 WHERE T2.People_ID = T1.People_ID)

records.question: Which people weigh exactly 200.0 and were involved as perpetrators in China where the location is Beijing, injured exactly 80, killed at least 23, and the year is at most 1994?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people.people_id = perpetrator.people_id
WHERE perpetrator.injured = 80 AND perpetrator.location = 'Beijing' AND perpetrator.killed >= 23 AND perpetrator.country = 'China' AND perpetrator.year <= 1994.0 AND people.weight = 200.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN perpetrator AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Weight = 200.0 AND T2.Injured = 80 AND T2.Location = 'Beijing' AND T2.Killed >= 23 AND T2.Country = 'China' AND T2.Year <= 1994.0

records.question: Who in the people database has the name Gary Goodner and a height that is exactly 6.7?
records.gold_sql:

WHERE people.name = 'Gary Goodner' AND people.height = 6.7
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Name = 'Gary Goodner' AND Height = 6.7

records.question: What people named Ron Baxter who weigh at most 205.0 and are at most 6.4 tall were involved as perpetrators in South Korea in 1982, specifically in Uiryeong on 04.26 April 26/27, and killed exactly 56?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people.people_id = perpetrator.people_id
WHERE perpetrator.killed = 56 AND perpetrator.country = 'South Korea' AND people.weight <= 205.0 AND people.name = 'Ron Baxter' AND perpetrator.location = 'Uiryeong' AND perpetrator.date = '04.26 April 26/27' AND perpetrator.year = 1982.0 AND people.height <= 6.4
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN perpetrator AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID WHERE T1.Weight <= 205.0 AND T1.Name = 'Ron Baxter' AND T1.Height <= 6.4 AND T2.Killed = 56 AND T2.Country = 'South Korea' AND T2.Location = 'Uiryeong' AND T2.Date = '04.26 April 26/27' AND T2.Year = 1982.0

records.question: Which people have caused at most 80 injured and no more than 23 killed?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN perpetrator ON people.people_id = perpetrator.people_id
WHERE perpetrator.injured <= 80 AND perpetrator.killed <= 23
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.People_ID FROM people AS T1 INNER JOIN perpetrator AS T2 ON T1.People_ID = T2.People_ID WHERE T2.Injured <= 80 AND T2.Killed <= 23
